texto: Surviving in business is like surviving in the jungle
autor: you must look for prey while on the lookout for predators.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a you must look for prey while on the lookout for predators.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Surviving in business is like surviving in the jungle” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, matshona-dhliwayo, surviving pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
